title: Research-backed AI
description: JEI-certified by the French government for genuine R&D. Our AI work is built on original research in Bayesian inference, not just API wrappers.

title: Production-first
description: We prototype fast, but we engineer for production. Proper evaluation, monitoring, error handling, and cost control from day one.

title: Knowledge transfer
description: We work embedded with your team and leave you owning the system. No vendor lock-in, no black boxes, no ongoing dependency.
